prompt: A premium ultra-detailed collectible trading card illustration of Kamen Rider Kuuga in Amazing Mighty Form, designed like a high-rarity SSR card. The composition is a dramatic front-facing action portrait with the armored hero centered and dominating the frame from thighs up, wearing glossy black and deep metallic crimson armor, a gold horned crest on the helmet, large faceted red compound eyes, and a detailed transformation belt with a red core. The hero extends one gloved hand toward the viewer holding a smaller card featuring his own image, creating a recursive card-within-card effect, while the other hand is open in a battle-ready pose. The background is a ruined city street at night filled with sparks, embers, debris, smoke, and multiple enemy monsters leaping and attacking from all sides; exactly 8 background figures are visible: 3 airborne enemies in the upper background, 3 standing or lunging enemies on the right side, and 2 smaller enemies near the lower left and bottom edge. Use intense cinematic lighting, glittering particle effects, holographic foil texture, gold filigree linework, and a luxurious black-and-gold art deco frame. Include ornate card UI text and badges integrated into the border: top center title "MASKED RIDER" above large metallic serif text "KAMEN RIDER KUUGA", a circular emblem in the top left, an iridescent shield badge in the top right with "SSR" and 5 gold stars beneath it, a bottom left label panel reading "CARD TYPE" and "CHARACTER", a bottom center nameplate reading "KAMEN RIDER KUUGA" with Japanese text "仮面ライダークウガ", a barcode below, and the subtitle "AMAZING MIGHTY FORM" at the very bottom. Add a large gold cursive artist-style signature at the lower right reading NickZag. Overall style: hyper-detailed tokusatsu character art, explosive poster energy, premium trading card game rarity, shimmering holographic highlights, crisp focus on the central hero, epic collectible showcase.
